enums.name: mjtAlignFree
enums.doc: whether to align free joints with the inertial frame

enumerators.name: mjBIAS_MUSCLE
enumerators.comment: muscle passive force computed by mju_muscleBias()

enumerators.name: mjBIAS_DCMOTOR
enumerators.comment: DC motor bias: back-EMF, cogging, LuGre friction

enumerators.name: mjBIAS_SO3
enumerators.comment: damping term of the SO3 geodesic servo

enums.name: mjtCamLight
enums.doc: tracking mode for camera and light

enumerators.name: mjCAMLIGHT_FIXED
enumerators.comment: pos and rot fixed in body

enumerators.name: mjCAMLIGHT_TRACK
enumerators.comment: pos tracks body, rot fixed in global

enumerators.name: mjCAMLIGHT_TRACKCOM
enumerators.comment: pos tracks subtree com, rot fixed in body

enumerators.name: mjCAMLIGHT_TARGETBODY
enumerators.comment: pos fixed in body, rot tracks target body

enumerators.name: mjCAMLIGHT_TARGETBODYCOM
enumerators.comment: pos fixed in body, rot tracks target subtree com

enumerators.name: mjCOLORSPACE_AUTO
enumerators.comment: attempts to autodetect color space, defaults to linear

enums.name: mjtConDataField
enums.doc: data fields returned by contact sensors

enumerators.name: mjNCONDATA
enumerators.comment: number of contact sensor data fields

enumerators.name: mjCNSTRSTATE_CONE
enumerators.comment: squared distance to cone cost (elliptic contact)

enumerators.name: mjDSBL_EULERDAMP
enumerators.comment: implicit integration of joint damping in Euler integrator

enumerators.name: mjDSBL_AUTORESET
enumerators.comment: automatic reset when numerical issues are detected

enumerators.name: mjDYN_NONE
enumerators.comment: no internal dynamics; ctrl specifies force

enumerators.name: mjDYN_FILTEREXACT
enumerators.comment: linear filter: da/dt = (u-a) / tau, with exact integration

enumerators.name: mjDYN_MUSCLE
enumerators.comment: piecewise linear filter with two time constants

enumerators.name: mjEQ_CONNECT
enumerators.comment: connect two bodies at a point (ball joint)

enumerators.name: mjEQ_WELD
enumerators.comment: fix relative position and orientation of two bodies

enumerators.name: mjEQ_JOINT
enumerators.comment: couple the values of two scalar joints with cubic

enumerators.name: mjEQ_TENDON
enumerators.comment: couple the lengths of two tendons with cubic

enumerators.name: mjEQ_FLEX
enumerators.comment: fix all edge lengths of a flex

enumerators.name: mjEQ_FLEXVERT
enumerators.comment: fix all vertex lengths of a flex

enumerators.name: mjEQ_FLEXSTRAIN
enumerators.comment: constrain strain of a trilinear/quadratic flex (B-bar)

enumerators.name: mjEQ_DISTANCE
enumerators.comment: unsupported, will cause an error if used

enumerators.name: mjFLEXSELF_NARROW
enumerators.comment: skip midphase, go directly to narrowphase

enumerators.name: mjFLEXSELF_BVH
enumerators.comment: use BVH in midphase (if midphase enabled)

enumerators.name: mjFLEXSELF_AUTO
enumerators.comment: choose between BVH and SAP automatically

enumerators.name: mjGAIN_MUSCLE
enumerators.comment: muscle FLV curve computed by mju_muscleGain()

enumerators.name: mjGAIN_DCMOTOR
enumerators.comment: DC motor gain: K or K/R

enumerators.name: mjGAIN_SO3
enumerators.comment: geodesic servo on an SO3 transmission: force = kp * log(error)

enums.name: mjtInertiaFromGeom
enums.doc: whether to infer body inertias from child geoms

enumerators.name: mjINERTIAFROMGEOM_FALSE
enumerators.comment: do not use; inertial element required

enumerators.name: mjINERTIAFROMGEOM_AUTO
enumerators.comment: use only if inertial element is missing

enumerators.name: mjINT_IMPLICITFAST
enumerators.comment: implicit in velocity, no rne derivative

enums.name: mjtLRMode
enums.doc: mode for actuator length range computation

enumerators.name: mjLIMITED_AUTO
enumerators.comment: limited inferred from presence of range

enumerators.name: mjLOG_DEBUG
enumerators.comment: internal engine debug trace (opt-in via topic filtering)

enumerators.name: mjOBJ_XBODY
enumerators.comment: body, used to access regular frame instead of i-frame

enums.name: mjtRayDataField
enums.doc: data fields returned by rangefinder sensors

enumerators.name: mjRAYDATA_DIST
enumerators.comment: distance from ray origin to nearest surface

enumerators.name: mjRAYDATA_POINT
enumerators.comment: point at which ray intersects nearest surface

enumerators.name: mjNRAYDATA
enumerators.comment: number of rangefinder sensor data fields

enums.name: mjtSameFrame
enums.doc: frame alignment of bodies with their children

enumerators.name: mjSAMEFRAME_BODY
enumerators.comment: frame is same as body frame

enumerators.name: mjSAMEFRAME_INERTIA
enumerators.comment: frame is same as inertial frame

enumerators.name: mjSAMEFRAME_BODYROT
enumerators.comment: frame orientation is same as body orientation

enumerators.name: mjSAMEFRAME_INERTIAROT
enumerators.comment: frame orientation is same as inertia orientation

enumerators.name: mjSENS_TOUCH
enumerators.comment: scalar contact normal forces summed over sensor zone

enumerators.name: mjSENS_FORCE
enumerators.comment: 3D force between site's body and its parent body

enumerators.name: mjSENS_TORQUE
enumerators.comment: 3D torque between site's body and its parent body

enumerators.name: mjSENS_RANGEFINDER
enumerators.comment: scalar distance to nearest geom along z-axis

enumerators.name: mjSENS_CAMPROJECTION
enumerators.comment: pixel coordinates of a site in the camera image

enumerators.name: mjSENS_JOINTPOS
enumerators.comment: scalar joint position (hinge and slide only)

enumerators.name: mjSENS_JOINTVEL
enumerators.comment: scalar joint velocity (hinge and slide only)

enumerators.name: mjSENS_JOINTACTFRC
enumerators.comment: scalar actuator force, measured at the joint

enumerators.name: mjSENS_TENDONACTFRC
enumerators.comment: scalar actuator force, measured at the tendon

enumerators.name: mjSENS_FRAMEXAXIS
enumerators.comment: 3D unit vector: x-axis of object's frame

enumerators.name: mjSENS_FRAMEYAXIS
enumerators.comment: 3D unit vector: y-axis of object's frame

enumerators.name: mjSENS_FRAMEZAXIS
enumerators.comment: 3D unit vector: z-axis of object's frame

enumerators.name: mjSENS_INSIDESITE
enumerators.comment: 1 if object is inside a site, 0 otherwise

enumerators.name: mjSENS_CONTACT
enumerators.comment: contacts which occurred during the simulation

enumerators.name: mjSENS_USER
enumerators.comment: sensor data provided by mjcb_sensor callback

enumerators.name: mjTEXTURE_2D
enumerators.comment: 2d texture, suitable for planes and hfields

enumerators.name: mjTEXTURE_CUBE
enumerators.comment: cube texture, suitable for all other geom types

enums.name: mjtTextureRole
enums.doc: role of texture map in rendering

enumerators.name: mjTRN_JOINTINPARENT
enumerators.comment: force on joint, expressed in parent frame

enumerators.name: mjTRN_BODY
enumerators.comment: adhesion force on a body's geoms

enumerators.name: mjTRN_SO3
enumerators.comment: torque on a relative orientation (3 force outputs)

enumerators.name: mjWARN_CONTACTFULL
enumerators.comment: too many contacts in contact list
